SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.doggoneit.service.repository

Interface ScanRepository

All Known Implementing Classes:
ScanRepositoryImpl
public interface ScanRepository
Repository abstraction for saved scans, predictions, and gallery projections.

      CompletableFuture<Scan> save(Scan scan)

    • saveWithPredictions

      CompletableFuture<ScanWithPredictions> saveWithPredictions(Scan scan, List<BreedPrediction> predictions, String selectedBreedLabel, Double selectedBreedConfidence)
      Saves a scan and top predictions with optional user-selected breed override.
      Parameters:
      scan - Scan metadata to persist.
      predictions - Prediction rows to persist with the scan.
      selectedBreedLabel - User-selected breed label, if any.
      selectedBreedConfidence - User-selected confidence score, if any.
      Returns:
      Future with combined scan/predictions result.

    • update

      CompletableFuture<Integer> update(Scan scan)

    • delete

      CompletableFuture<Integer> delete(Scan scan)
